quality.rationale: 结合四速归一化与时间平移守恒量推导坐标速度，并通过正交标架投影求局域观测量，逻辑链条完整且具典型相对论动力学背景

origin.question: Problem 15.3. A particle falls radially into a Schwarzschild metric. As measured by proper time at infinity, what is its inward coordinate velocity (dr/dt) at a (curvature-) radius $r$ ? What is the locally-measured velocity relative to a stationary observer at the same radius?
origin.solution: We have two constants for radial fall: $\mathbf {u} \cdot \mathbf {u} = -1$ and $\mathbf {u} \cdot \partial/\partial t = \mathbf {u}_0 = -(1 - 2\mathbf {M}/\mathbf {r})\mathbf {u}^0$ . From these we get$$\begin {array}{l} \mathbf {u} \cdot \mathbf {u} = - 1 = - (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) \left(\mathrm {u}^{0}\right)^{2} + (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r})^{- 1} \left(\mathrm {u}^{\mathrm {r}}\right)^{2} \\= \left[ - (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) + (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r})^{- 1} (\mathrm {d r} / \mathrm {d} t)^{2}\right] \left(\mathrm {u}^{0}\right)^{2} \\= \left[ - (1 - 2 M / r) + (1 - 2 M / r)^{- 1} (d r / d t)^{2}\right] \left(u_{0}\right)^{2} (1 - 2 M / r)^{2}. \\\end {array}$$Solving for $(\mathrm{dr} / \mathrm{dt})^2$ we find$$\left(\mathrm {d r} / \mathrm {d t}\right)^{2} = (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r})^{2} \left[ 1 - (1 - 2 \mathrm {M} / \mathrm {r}) \left(\mathrm {u}_{0}\right)^{- 2}\right].$$A stationary observer measures time intervals $\hat{\mathbf{d}}\mathbf{t} = (1 - 2\mathbf {M} / \mathbf {r})^{\frac {1}{2}}\mathbf{d}\mathbf{t}$ and radial distances $\hat{\mathbf{d}}\mathbf{r} = (1 - 2\mathbf {M} / \mathbf {r})^{-\frac {1}{2}}\mathbf{d}\mathbf{r}$ so he measures velocity$$\frac {\mathrm {d} \hat {\mathbf {r}}}{\mathrm {d} \hat {\mathbf {t}}} = (1 - 2 \mathbf {M} / \mathbf {r})^{- 1} \frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {r}}{\mathrm {d} t}.$$Notice that independent of the value of $\mathbf{u}_0$ this locally measured velocity approaches the velocity of light as r approaches 2M.

killing_vectors.name: time_translation
killing_vectors.description: 时间平移 Killing 矢量 (∂_t)，对应能量守恒

killing_vectors.name: rot_phi
killing_vectors.description: 绕 φ 轴旋转 Killing 矢量 (∂_φ)，对应角动量守恒
